value: Analyze the product name [name_en] and images [images] to describe in detail their visual features, colors, materials,  texture, lore and key design elements.
Analyze these product images [imageAnalysis] and describe their visual features, colors, materials, and key design elements.

Based on the following analysis [result] Create a production description in plain text. Avoid contaminating the description with expressions like "Here is a plain text production description based on the provided analysis:" or giving away the title in the description, like "**Nurgle 4cm Metal Enamel Pin - Warhammer 40k**". I just want a plain text, engaging product description.
Refine [result] and create an engaging Production description for Product.
